steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content: The correspondence is $L$ with $P$, $M$ with $Q$, and $N$ with $R$. Since the triangles are similar, corresponding angles have equal measures.

steps.title: Use the given angle
steps.content: Because $N$ corresponds to $R$, the measure of angle $R$ equals the measure of angle $N$. The side-length scale factor affects side lengths, not angle measures. The answer is C.
